title: bauhinia glauca subsp. hupehana
intro: Bauhinia glauca subsp. hupehana, commonly known as the 'Pride of Hawaii' or 'Orange Bauhinia', is a flowering plant species native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia glauca subsp. hupehana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
